content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.1 WARN — App is login-gated (App/LoginView.swift:1-15 with SecureField) but demo credentials are placeholders ("test"/"changeme") and notes.txt contains only "TBD" (fastlane/metadata/review_information/{demo_user.txt,demo_password.txt,notes.txt}).
Pierre: Apple's reviewer cannot get past the sign-in screen without working credentials and clear instructions, so placeholder values like "test", "changeme", and "TBD" will almost certainly cause a rejection for inability to review the app. Provide a real, working demo account and write notes explaining any extra steps needed to reach core features (e.g. paywall, special settings). This is a near-certain 2.1 rejection if submitted as-is.
